name: Jing

skills.name: Lethal Reflections
skills.description: Jing and her image apply 2 different types of marks on enemies when they deal damage. If an enemy has both types of mark at the same time, they take damage and the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2 are reset.

skills.name: Reflective Assault
skills.description:
Dashes forward, damaging enemies in her path and slowing them while enhancing her next Basic Attack.
If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, one will be created to fight alongside her.

skills.name: Shattered Illusions
skills.description:
Deals damage to nearby enemies while recovering Health and gaining increased Movement Speed.
If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, then one will be created to fight alongside her.

skills.name: Mirror Domain
skills.description: Dashes forward, pulling enemies to the center of her magic circle and immobilizing them there. She gains damage reduction while inside the circle, and recovers Health when she swaps locations.

skillsZh.name: 鑄鏡
skillsZh.description: 鏡的本體和鏡像對敵人造成傷害會分別施加印記，如果敵人同時擁有2種印記會受到傷害，並重置基礎技能冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 開鋒
skillsZh.description:
鏡向前位移對路徑敵人造成傷害和減速，並強化下次普攻。
場上沒有鏡像時，會產生鏡像一起攻擊。

skillsZh.name: 裂空
skillsZh.description:
鏡對周圍敵人造成傷害並獲得生命值回復和加速。
場上沒有鏡像時，會產生鏡像一起攻擊。

skillsZh.name: 見影
skillsZh.description: 鏡向前位移，將敵人拉至法陣中間並定身。身處法陣中時獲得減傷，【移形】交換過程獲得生命值回復。

tips: Build: Rapacious Bite, Overlord's Might, Starbreaker.
tipsZh: 鏡（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 45.99%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：貪婪之噬、強者破軍、碎星錘.

patchHistory.change: Enhanced Basic Attack and Ultimate Effect Upgrade

patchHistory.detail: In contrast to the other highly mobile assassins in the game, Jing is relatively strong throughout most of the game. A well-farmed and played Jing can even make short work of rival tanks. As our players continue to learn more about the game and hone their skills and strategies, we're seeing a growing number of Jing aces. Our purpose in adjusting her late game capabilities is to give other players and heroes a small hope of survival when going up against her.

patchHistoryZh.change: 強化普攻&大招效果升級

patchHistoryZh.detail: In contrast to the other highly mobile assassins in the game, Jing is relatively strong throughout most of the game. A well-farmed and played Jing can even make short work of rival tanks. As our players continue to learn more about the game and hone their skills and strategies, we're seeing a growing number of Jing aces. Our purpose in adjusting her late game capabilities is to give other players and heroes a small hope of survival when going up against her.

faqs.question: Is Jing good in current season?
faqs.answer: Jing is Tier B Assassin with 45.99% win rate, 0.36% pick rate, and 0.15% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Jing build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Rapacious Bite, Overlord's Might, Starbreaker, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Immovable - Sky Dome.

faqs.question: How to counter Jing?
faqs.answer: Pick Angela, Daji, Gan & Mo. Strong into Dharma, Ata, Lian Po.

faqsZh.question: 鏡 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 鏡 為 B 梯度，勝率 45.99%、選取 0.36%、禁用 0.15%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 鏡 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：貪婪之噬、強者破軍、碎星錘、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、不動・天穹.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 鏡？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Angela、Daji、Gan & Mo。鏡 克制 Dharma、Ata、Lian Po。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Dharma, Ata, Lian Po. Weak into: Angela, Daji, Gan & Mo.

guide.overview: Jing is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 45.5% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Jing: Jing and her image apply 2 different types of marks on enemies when they deal damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Rapacious Bite, Axe of Torment, then complete Master Sword, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Jing's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Reflective Assault → Shattered Illusions → Mirror Domain → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Mirror Domain (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Shattered Illusions provides mobility or stick—max first. Reflective Assault second for damage. Mirror Domain on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Reflective Assault → Shattered Illusions → Mirror Domain → weave basic attacks

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Mirror Domain after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Jing sits at Tier B globally (45.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Jing vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Wukong wins 4.3% more often globally. Choose Jing when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Jing vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Musashi wins 5.3% more often globally. Choose Jing when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Jing excels into Dharma, Ata, Lian Po. Avoid blind picking into Angela, Daji, Gan & Mo without team peel.
